data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Template A/B testing' as part of the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the existence or functionality of A/B testing for templates. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the implementation of this feature is missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of 'Template A/B testing'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of 'Template A/B testing'.
